steps.title: Translate daily distance to an inequality
steps.content: The sea turtle travels 68 to 74 miles per day. Write this as: $$68 \leq \text{(daily distance)} \leq 74$$

steps.title: Scale to 31 days by multiplying by 31
steps.content: For the total distance $x$ over 31 days, multiply each part of the inequality by 31: $$(68)(31) \leq \text{(daily distance)}(31) \leq (74)(31)$$ Since $x$ is the total distance: $$(68)(31) \leq x \leq (74)(31)$$ That confirms B is correct.
